title: Styled Barrels
description: Have you ever wished that barrels came in all of the wood variants? Well, this datapack does exactly that!
body:
# Styled Barrels
Have you ever wished that barrels came in all of the wood variants? Well, this datapack does exactly that!

### What this datapack adds
- Oak Barrel (Block)
- Spruce Barrel (Block)
- Birch Barrel (Block)
- Jungle Barrel (Block)
- Acacia Barrel (Block)
- Dark Oak Barrel (Block)
- Mangrove Barrel (Block)
- Crimson Barrel (Block)
- Warped Barrel (Block)
